category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Albania EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入阿尔巴尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入阿爾巴尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Albania CE and EN-aligned product requirements, TS EN IEC 61851 evidence, ERE / OST grid-connection expectations, Type 2 / CCS2 connector readiness, OCPP, EMC, and safety / dangerous-goods requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与阿尔巴尼亚 CE 与 EN 对齐产品要求、TS EN IEC 61851证据、ERE / OST并网预期、Type 2 / CCS2接口就绪、OCPP、EMC以及安全与危险货物要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與阿爾巴尼亞 CE 與 EN 對齊產品要求、TS EN IEC 61851 證據、ERE / OST 併網預期、Type 2 / CCS2 接口就緒、OCPP、EMC 以及安全與危險貨物要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, EV network operators, and installers should verify current Albania DPS, ERE, OST requirements, customs documentation, charging-service obligations, and project documentation before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应核实阿尔巴尼亚当前DPS、ERE、OST要求、海关文件、充电服务义务与项目文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應核實阿爾巴尼亞當前 DPS、ERE、OST 要求、海關文件、充電服務義務與項目文件。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers exported to Albania, the practical gaps are CE-aligned product and EMC readiness, TS EN IEC 61851 electrical-safety evidence, Type 2 / CCS2 connector and locking compatibility, OCPP backend acceptance, ERE / OST site-grid coordination, and EPDK-style service-licensing equivalents where public operation is involved. GB/T-only configurations are a technical baseline only and require converter planning for Albanian deployment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩出口阿尔巴尼亚时，主要差距包括：CE对齐的产品与EMC准备、TS EN IEC 61851电气安全证据、Type 2 / CCS2接口及锁止兼容性、OCPP后台验收、ERE / OST现场并网协调，以及涉及公共运营时的服务许可类要求。仅GB/T配置只能作为技术基线，需按阿尔巴尼亚部署目标重新设计与确认。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁出口阿爾巴尼亞時，主要差距包括：CE 對齊的產品與 EMC 準備、TS EN IEC 61851 電氣安全證據、Type 2 / CCS2 接口及鎖止兼容性、OCPP 後台驗收、ERE / OST 現場併網協調，以及涉及公共運營時的服務許可類要求。僅 GB/T 配置只能作為技術基線，需按阿爾巴尼亞部署目標重新設計與確認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
